'''thowangaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:shackleless|shackleless]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-w-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:shackleless|shackleless]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| thowangaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thowangithi|thowangithi]] || [[word:thowangiji|thowangiji]] || [[word:thowangishi|thowangishi]] || [[word:thowangiki|thowangiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thowanguthuthu|thowanguthuthu]] || [[word:thowangujuju|thowangujuju]] || [[word:thowangushushu|thowangushushu]] || [[word:thowangukuku|thowangukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thowanguthu|thowanguthu]] || [[word:thowanguju|thowanguju]] || [[word:thowangushu|thowangushu]] || [[word:thowanguku|thowanguku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thowangufthuf|thowangufthuf]] || [[word:thowangufjuf|thowangufjuf]] || [[word:thowangufshuf|thowangufshuf]] || [[word:thowangufkuf|thowangufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thowangethe|thowangethe]] || [[word:thowangeje|thowangeje]] || [[word:thowangeshe|thowangeshe]] || [[word:thowangeke|thowangeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thowangothotho|thowangothotho]] || [[word:thowangojojo|thowangojojo]] || [[word:thowangoshosho|thowangoshosho]] || [[word:thowangokoko|thowangokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thowangotho|thowangotho]] || [[word:thowangojo|thowangojo]] || [[word:thowangosho|thowangosho]] || [[word:thowangoko|thowangoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thowangofthof|thowangofthof]] || [[word:thowangofjof|thowangofjof]] || [[word:thowangofshof|thowangofshof]] || [[word:thowangofkof|thowangofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:thowangĂŻfthĂŻf|thowangĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thowangĂŻfjĂŻf|thowangĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thowangĂŻfshĂŻf|thowangĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thowangĂŻfkĂŻf|thowangĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:thowangĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|thowangĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thowangĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|thowangĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thowangĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|thowangĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thowangĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|thowangĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:thowangĂŻfthĂŻf|thowangĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thowangĂŻfjĂŻf|thowangĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thowangĂŻfshĂŻf|thowangĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thowangĂŻfkĂŻf|thowangĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:thowangĂŻfthĂŻf|thowangĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thowangĂŻfjĂŻf|thowangĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thowangĂŻfshĂŻf|thowangĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thowangĂŻfkĂŻf|thowangĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thowangĂŠthĂŠ|thowangĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:thowangĂŠjĂŠ|thowangĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:thowangĂŠshĂŠ|thowangĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:thowangĂŠkĂŠ|thowangĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thowangathatha|thowangathatha]] || [[word:thowangajaja|thowangajaja]] || [[word:thowangashasha|thowangashasha]] || [[word:thowangakaka|thowangakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thowangatha|thowangatha]] || [[word:thowangaja|thowangaja]] || [[word:thowangasha|thowangasha]] || [[word:thowangaka|thowangaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thowangafthaf|thowangafthaf]] || [[word:thowangafjaf|thowangafjaf]] || [[word:thowangafshaf|thowangafshaf]] || [[word:thowangafkaf|thowangafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:thowangasha|thowangasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:thowangshĂ«sha|thowangshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thowangrosha|thowangrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thowangmusha|thowangmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:thowangyasha|thowangyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothowangnkshĂ«sha|gothowangnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothowangnkrosha|gothowangnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothowangnkmusha|gothowangnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothowangnkyasha|gothowangnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:thowawangasha|thowawangasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thowawangshĂ«sha|thowawangshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thowawangrosha|thowawangrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thowawangmusha|thowawangmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thowawangyasha|thowawangyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothowawangnkshĂ«sha|gothowawangnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothowawangnkrosha|gothowawangnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothowawangnkmusha|gothowawangnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothowawangnkyasha|gothowawangnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:thewĂŠngasha|thewĂŠngasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thewĂŠngshĂ«sha|thewĂŠngshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thewĂŠngrosha|thewĂŠngrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thewĂŠngmusha|thewĂŠngmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thewĂŠngyasha|thewĂŠngyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothewĂŠngnkshĂ«sha|gothewĂŠngnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothewĂŠngnkrosha|gothewĂŠngnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothewĂŠngnkmusha|gothewĂŠngnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothewĂŠngnkyasha|gothewĂŠngnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:thowfangasha|thowfangasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thowfangshĂ«sha|thowfangshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thowfangrosha|thowfangrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thowfangmusha|thowfangmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thowfangyasha|thowfangyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothowfangnkshĂ«sha|gothowfangnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothowfangnkrosha|gothowfangnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothowfangnkmusha|gothowfangnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothowfangnkyasha|gothowfangnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
